## PNW Spirits Project Instructions

- Always add new code below all import statements in each file.
- Do not add duplicate styling tags or repeat CSS class definitions in styling files.
- Always use the global theme colors (defined in globals.css) for all styling and UI elements.
- The website must always maintain a warm, cozy, professional, speakeasy-inspired vibe in all design and code decisions.
- Ensure all UI is responsive and looks good on both desktop and mobile.
- Use only modern, elegant sans-serif fonts (e.g., Geist, Inter) for all text.
- Prefer functional React components and hooks.
- Clean up unused code, imports, and styles after edits.
- Use descriptive, meaningful names for components, variables, and CSS classes.
- Keep components focused and modular—one responsibility per component.
- Use TypeScript for all code and keep types strict and clear.
- Document any non-obvious logic with concise comments.
- Keep styling out of components—use CSS modules that are per component.
- Make sure there aren't any errors after writing code.
